---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in TIMPS Swarm
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior.

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Environment**
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14.5]
- Node version: [e.g. 22.3]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11]
- IDE/tool: [e.g. Claude Code, Cursor, OpenCode]

**Logs**
Paste any error output.
